notes: v0.16.20 — Hero card + PROFILE LV truly per-class. Two remaining UI spots still showed account level next to ship art: the HOME hero card and the PROFILE 'LEVEL + XP bar' panel under the class chip. Both now read the active class's per-class pool (class_level / class_xp). Switch from SHARD LV12 to BASTION LV1 and the LV on the ship card flips to 1. Account-wide level still lives on the top bar score chip and the profile umbrella XP bar (the cross-class total). Windows only.
